generic_rules: Focus repairs on the scope of the diagnostic; type-level issues require type-level fixes, and implementation-level issues require implementation-level fixes.
Prioritize fixing unresolved references or invalid declarations within AGREE expressions.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `assume`, `guarantee`, `eq`, and `const` keywords for AGREE statements.
Valid AGREE scalar types are `int`, `real`, and `bool`.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce architectural changes to resolve AGREE syntax or scoping errors.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
